name: The City Street
description:
Simple houses line both sides of the street, and guards are posted at every
junction.  There is a castle to the north, and more streets to the east and
west.  There is a large sign posted on a wall here.

extra_descriptions.description:
There is a sign posted here, it says:


                 ATTENTION CITIZENS OF GRAYE!

Due to the demons beseiging our city, their night-time raids, and their recent kidnapping of King Relnar, we ask all citizens to observe the 7 pm curfew!  Those out on the streets after dark run the risk of being mistaken for the enemy and killed!

signed,
The Graye Guard
